title: Silvertip Luxury Chalet
definition: High-gross Silvertip luxury product can still show -$800/month when financing, taxes, and operating costs stack — gross is not net.
reality_check: Snow removal and utilities scale up
Booking lead times can be lumpy

faq.q: Can luxury STR lose money monthly?
faq.a: Yes — high revenue often pairs with high debt service and operating spend.

faq.q: What do most investors get wrong?
faq.a: They anchor on peak-week ADR instead of annual blended occupancy.
Yes — but run negative and break-even cases, not best-case only.
